videos.title: AI: Start Small, Build Confidence
videos.description:
Summary

The conversation emphasizes the importance of starting small and building confidence over time when working with AI. It also highlights the value of leveraging patterns and tools to improve daily work, rather than focusing on mastering specific tools.

Takeaways

* Start small, use AI to support work
* Build confidence over time
* Trust the process, don't focus on mastering tools

Chapters

* 00:00 Leveraging Patterns and Tools

videos.title: Do You Really Need a Silver Layer in Microsoft Fabric? | Architecture Debate
videos.description:
Are you actually supposed to use a Silver layer in every Microsoft Fabric solution?

In this video, we debate one of the biggest architecture discussions happening in modern data platforms right now:

👉 Do you really need a Silver layer in a Medallion Architecture?

Patrick argues that most Microsoft Fabric architectures are overbuilt with unnecessary Bronze, Silver, and Gold layers that add complexity, ownership overhead, and cost.

videos.title: The Week the AI Story Shifted
videos.description:
Weekly recap highlights a shifting AI narrative and growing consensus: automation will create relational and augmentation jobs instead of an immediate job apocalypse. Large corporate deals and data center investments signal a pivot from model hype toward sustained infrastructure and enterprise deployment. Product maturation appears through harness engineering, voice features, and persistent goal-driven agents enabling continuous unattended workflows and surging token demand.

The AI Daily Brief

videos.title: Surprise Elon-Anthropic Team Up Reshapes AI Race
videos.description: Surprise SpaceX–Anthropic partnership injects massive Colossus-scale compute into Anthropic's Claude ecosystem and reframes compute as a strategic kingmaker. DevDay emphasized an agent-first strategy with Dreaming (scheduled memory review), Managed Agents, Outcomes-based grading, add-ins, industry connectors, and multi-agent orchestration. Shift toward harnesses and agent ecosystems raises business and safety questions about consolidation, continual learning, and control of critical AI infrastru
